risk_note.tr: Adimlar Microsoft Support 'Update drivers manually in Windows' belgesinden alinmistir. Microsoft'un sirali tavsiyesi: (1) Windows Update otomatik, (2) Device Manager manuel, (3) Donanim uretici sitesi. 3rd-party 'driver updater' uygulamalarindan kacinilmali.
risk_note.en: Steps sourced from Microsoft Support 'Update drivers manually in Windows'. Microsoft's priority order: (1) Windows Update auto, (2) Device Manager manual, (3) Hardware vendor site. Avoid 3rd-party 'driver updater' tools.

body.tr: Microsoft alintisi: 'The best way to get driver updates in Windows is automatically using Windows Update.' Settings > Windows Update > Check for updates. Ek olarak Settings > Windows Update > Advanced options > Optional updates - opsiyonel driver guncelleyiciler buradadir.
body.en: Microsoft quote: 'The best way to get driver updates in Windows is automatically using Windows Update.' Settings > Windows Update > Check for updates. Additionally Settings > Windows Update > Advanced options > Optional updates - optional driver updates are here.

title.tr: Settings > Windows Update > Advanced options > Optional updates
title.en: Settings > Windows Update > Advanced options > Optional updates

title.tr: Device Manager ile manuel (Windows Update yetersizse)
title.en: Device Manager manual method (if Windows Update insufficient)

body.tr: 1) Device Manager'i ac (Win+X > Device Manager). 2) Cihaz kategorisini genislet (Display adapters, Network adapters vb). 3) Cihaza sag tikla > Update driver. 4) 'Search automatically for drivers' (online ara) veya 'Browse my computer for drivers' (yerel klasor) sec. 5) Browse secersen indirilen .inf dosyasinin oldugu klasoru goster.
body.en: 1) Open Device Manager (Win+X > Device Manager). 2) Expand device category (Display adapters, Network adapters, etc). 3) Right-click device > Update driver. 4) Pick 'Search automatically for drivers' (online) or 'Browse my computer for drivers' (local folder). 5) If Browse, point to folder containing downloaded .inf file.

body.tr: Sirayla guvenilirlik: 1) Windows Update (Microsoft tarafindan imzali + test edilmis), 2) anakart/laptop uretici sitesi (resmi destek), 3) GPU uretici (NVIDIA/AMD/Intel direkt indirme). UYARI: Microsoft 3rd-party 'driver updater' araclarindan kacinilmasini onerir - sahte/kotu amacli surucu riski.
body.en: Trust order: 1) Windows Update (Microsoft-signed + tested), 2) motherboard/laptop vendor site (official support), 3) GPU vendor (NVIDIA/AMD/Intel direct download). WARNING: Microsoft recommends avoiding 3rd-party 'driver updater' tools - risk of fake/malicious drivers.
